items.title: A Look at McDonald's (MCD) Valuation Following a 5% Dividend Increase
items.description: McDonald's (MCD) just gave investors something to consider, announcing a 5% increase in its quarterly dividend. This move highlights management's steady confidence in the fast-food giant’s ability to deliver reliable profits. See our latest analysis for McDonald's. McDonald's share price showed steady momentum over the past year, with a 6.94% total shareholder return and resilient performance despite some volatility in the broader fast-food sector. The recent dividend hike comes after...
